characters.name: Aunt Winnie
characters.description: Aunt WinnieImage Description"Aunt Winnie" Voiced byNameAunt WinnieGenderFemaleSpeciesHuman (Spirit)DebutQuest in The Castle Aunt Winnie(akaYour Auntieness) appears inKnights of the Sparkly TablethenRock-A-Bye-BabyandThe Great Sparkle Quest It's implied she died long before Nella was born, and now she appears as a magic projection on the Sparkly Table. She's described byQueen Momas being a lot like Nella, in that she loved going on quests and hanging out with cute critters.
characters.personality_section: She's described byQueen Momas being a lot like Nella, in that she loved going on quests and hanging out with cute critters.

characters.name: Badalf the Wicked Wizard
characters.description: Badalf the Wicked WizardImage Description"Badalf the Wicked Wizard" Voiced by Chris Critelli/Jeremy LevyNameBadalf the Wicked WizardGenderMaleSpeciesHuman (Wizard)DebutNella vs. The Wicked WizardVoiceChris Critelli(Season 1)Jeremy Levy(Season 2)Badalf the Wicked Wizardis the evil wizard who is the enemy of Nella and is one of the main antagonists ofNella the Princess Knight. Inseason 1he is usually just calledBadalfbut inseason 2episodes likeFreezing Out the Fleagleshe for some reason is just called by the titleWicked Wizardand they don't use his given name. He has a goat friend namedTerry.

characters.name: Blaine
characters.description: BlaineImage DescriptionBlaineNameBlaineGenderMaleSpeciesHumanDebut"The Blaine Game"VoiceEvan Christy Blaineis a character fromNella the Princess Knight. Blaine is a sometimes bossy/mean knight. Blaine is a sometimes bossy/mean knight. He claims that he is the best at everything he does. Quite often, his ego causes trouble for himself, nd he must ask for help. Sometimes he thinks he can do lots of things better than anyone else. He also sometimes thinks of Nella as his rival.

characters.name: Clod
characters.description: ClodImage Description"Clod" Voiced by Matthew Gumley/Joe AttewellNameClodGenderMaleSpeciesHorse-like creatureDebut"Sir Clod"VoiceMatthew Gumley(US)Joe Attewell(UK) Clod(akaSir Clod) is one of the main characters onNella the Princess Knight. Clod is Sir Garrett's talking steed. He has orange fur and resembles a horse with two horns and a teal-colored mane. He is very talkative and tends to provide comic relief the most out of the group. Clod is a silly, clumsy, funny and big hearted horse/steed.
characters.personality_section: Clod is a silly, clumsy, funny and big hearted horse/steed.
